pluses: Vigour of the Edain — hardy and hale (+2 hearts)
Valour of Men — a stronger, steadier blow
Tall of Númenor — long of reach in the strike and in the work of hands
Wayfarer — unhindered on any ground, and quick upon the road
Ambition of the Secondborn — learns every craft the swifter
Last Stand — near death, the desperate valour of Men blazes up: Strength and Resistance while grievously wounded
minuses: The Doom of Men — no ancient gift shields you from fire, dark, or dread
Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
